category_sources: Official GitHub README describes t-rec as a terminal recorder for GIF/MP4 output.
source_facts.description says it is a terminal recorder that generates animated GIF images.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title is "t-rec: Terminal Recorder".
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/sassman/t-rec-rs, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists GIF/MP4 generation, Rust implementation, and command-line usage.
source_facts.description identifies terminal recording and animated GIF output.
